question: Which 5 products generated the most revenue from completed orders? Show product name and revenue, highest first.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT p.name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.name LIMIT 5", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT p.name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.name LIMIT 5
